mapper.select: ( select pv.prj_id as id, pv.prj_cd as prjCd, pv.prj_nm as prjNm, pv.par_cd as parCd, pv.par_nm as parNm, pv.is_leaf as leaf, '1' as toAdd from dataintegration.view_hsp_project pv MINUS select pr.id, pr.project_code as prjCd, pr.project_name as prjNm, pr.parent_project_code as parCd, pr.parent_project_name as parNm, pr.is_leaf as leaf, '1' as toAdd from system_project pr ) UNION ( select pr.id, pr.project_code as prjCd, pr.project_name as prjNm, pr.parent_project_code as parCd, pr.parent_project_name as parNm, pr.is_leaf as leaf, '2' as toAdd from system_project pr MINUS select pv.prj_id as id, pv.prj_cd as prjCd, pv.prj_nm as prjNm, pv.par_cd as parCd, pv.par_nm as parNm, pv.is_leaf as leaf, '2' as toAdd from dataintegration.view_hsp_project pv )
